# Cosmic Refractions
## Scripture
"The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands." - Psalm 19:1

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the summer sky, we're met with a kaleidoscope of colors and celestial wonders. The stars, planets, and galaxies all reflect the glory of God, like a masterpiece of refractions. Just as a prism breaks down light into its individual hues, God's creation reveals the multifaceted nature of His character. We see His power in the soaring eagles, His wisdom in the migration patterns of birds, and His beauty in the shimmering aurora borealis. As we contemplate the celestial ballet, we're reminded that our lives are also a reflection of God's glory. Like the stars, we twinkled into existence at the moment of conception, uniquely crafted to shine for His praise.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the cosmic refractions in the night sky, help us to see the reflections of Your glory in our own lives. May our hearts be filled with wonder and awe, and may our spirits be lifted by the realization that we are part of Your grand masterpiece. Shine Your light through us, that we may refract Your love, wisdom, and beauty to a world in need. In Jesus' name, we pray. Amen.
